name: winshots
description: Local Windows capture workflows for Codex debugging with Winshots and its MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Capture local Windows app state for Codex
interface.longDescription: Winshots gives Codex local-first workflows for capturing visible Windows app state, UI Automation text, targeted windows, recent captures, and short visual debugging sessions through the Winshots MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Capture the current Windows app with Winshots and summarize what Codex should inspect.
Use Winshots to target a visible app window and collect screenshot plus UI context.
Record a short Winshots visual session for this UI bug.
